name: benben-erp
description: Benben ERP — local-first Windows desktop ERP shell
author: Benben Software, Inc.

scripts.start: npm run build:desktop && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.dev: npm run build:desktop && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.dev:finance-api: npm run build:desktop && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron desktop/scripts/dev-finance-api.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:desktop
scripts.build:desktop: node scripts/write-build-stamp.mjs && node scripts/assert-renderer-staged.mjs && prisma generate && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && node scripts/bundle-preload.mjs
scripts.build:demo: cross-env BENBEN_BUILD_FLAVOR=demo VITE_BENBEN_DEMO_BUILD=true npm run build
scripts.start:demo: cross-env BENBEN_BUILD_FLAVOR=demo VITE_BENBEN_DEMO_BUILD=true npm run build && cross-env BENBEN_BUILD_FLAVOR=demo NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.dist:demo: cross-env BENBEN_BUILD_FLAVOR=demo VITE_BENBEN_DEMO_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win --config demo/electron-builder.yml
scripts.verify:packaged-ui: npm run build:ui && node desktop/scripts/verify-packaged-ui.mjs --pre-package && npm run dist:dir && node desktop/scripts/verify-packaged-ui.mjs --packaged-only
scripts.verify: npm run verify:phase1 && npm run verify:phase2
